conservative.name: Swarm 'Em!
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Snotlings, Goblings
Multiple Greenskins must be engaged with the target

success.description: The target is struck for normal damage, +1 damage for every 3 Greenskins in the engagement
The target is struck for critical damage, +1 damage for every 2 Greenskins in the engagement

boon.description: +1 damage for every 3 Greenskins in the engagement

bane.description: The target may remove 1 recharge token from any of his currently recharging cards

chaosStar.description: All snotlings and goblins in the engagement suffer 1 wound

reckless.name: Swarm 'Em!
reckless.requirements: You and at least one ally must be engaged with the target

success.description: You make your numbers count, cackling and jabbing and swarming your foe. You hit for normal damage, +1 damage for every 3 allies in the engagement
You hit for normal damage, + 1 damage for every 2 allies in the engagement

boon.description: +1 damage per 2 allies in the engagement

bane.description: The target may remove 1 recharge token from any of his currently recharging cards
